name: Maya Sterling
headline: Senior Data Analyst
summary: I turn messy data into decisions people act on, dashboards that get used and experiments that move the numbers.
about: Data analyst with 6+ years turning messy data into decisions. I build dashboards people actually use and partner with product teams to ship measurable wins, from churn models to checkout experiments.

bullets: Built the seller-growth analytics suite used by 200+ category managers, cutting weekly reporting time by 70%.
Led an A/B testing framework that lifted checkout conversion by 4.2%.
Mentored 3 junior analysts and set SQL and dbt code-review standards.
Owned the delivery-ETA model evaluation pipeline across 15 cities.
Designed exec dashboards that became the weekly leadership ritual.

projects.title: Churn Early-Warning System
projects.description: Predictive model flagging at-risk accounts 30 days out at 0.81 precision; now drives the retention playbook.

projects.title: City Demand Heatmaps
projects.description: Interactive geo-dashboards for ops capacity planning across 15 cities.

testimonials.quote: Maya turns ambiguous questions into dashboards the whole org runs on.
testimonials.author: VP Product, Northwind Retail

testimonials.quote: The rare analyst who moves the metric, not just reports it.
testimonials.author: Growth Lead, Quikbite

chatbot.a: SQL and experimentation. I have shipped A/B testing frameworks end to end and built the analytics stack 200+ stakeholders rely on.

chatbot.q: Tell me about your biggest impact.
chatbot.a: I cut weekly reporting time by 70% with a seller-growth analytics suite, and lifted checkout conversion by 4.2% through a structured A/B testing program.
SQL, Python (pandas), dbt, Looker, Tableau and BigQuery day to day, plus solid stats and forecasting.

chatbot.q: Are you open to new roles?
chatbot.a: Yes. I'm open to senior data analyst and analytics-partner roles. The fastest way to reach me is maya.sterling@example.com.
B.Tech in Computer Science from Westbridge Institute of Technology, plus an Advanced Data Analytics certification.
